## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX Labs' AI-driven content marketing services for potential collaboration with Pinecone.](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs offers AI-powered content creation and SEO optimization, with a focus on editorial content and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Their process includes deep research, content strategy, and AI workflows with human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Pricing model: 10-20 cents per word for published and refreshed content; 90-day pilot period available](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [GrowthX Labs can augment existing content teams and provide comprehensive content strategy within the first week](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)

## Topics

### Pinecone's Current Content Situation

  - [Patrick joined Pinecone 5-6 months ago](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [Small but effective marketing team](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Strong organic presence, ranking highly for important keywords](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Traffic drops significantly after the top 3-4 keywords](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [\~900 pages of content published](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

### GrowthX Labs' Approach and Services

  - [AI workflows as code framework with runtime layer](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
  - [Process: research → writing → editing → publishing](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Content OS built in Airtable for tracking opportunities and progress](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Week 1: Site audit, competitor analysis, content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Week 2: Content OS finalization, strategy alignment, calibration](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [Technical SEO audit included in initial assessment](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)

### Content Strategy and Long-tail Keywords

  - [Focus on long-tail keywords and topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Identify opportunities beyond high-volume, high-difficulty keywords](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Example: exploring topics like prompt injection, red teaming for AI security](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)

### Integration with Existing Teams

  - [Can augment in-house writers and subject matter experts](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Flexibility in task division (e.g., GrowthX for definitional content, in-house for thought leadership)](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Collaborative ideation and content review process](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Pricing and Engagement Model

  - [10-20 cents per word for published and refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [90-day pilot period with option to opt-out anytime](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Transparent pricing available on website](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)

### GrowthX Labs' Growth and Expertise

  - [Recently closed Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Hiring high-profile SEO experts (e.g., former heads of SEO from G2.com, TripAdvisor)](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Marcel's background in AI space (Skale AI, DeepGram)](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Patrick to discuss opportunity with Mike (PR-focused colleague) and content team](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Tentative date penciled in for April 7th (pending team discussion)](https://fathom.video/share/YeaoNHzxydfm3NXyta6x7i-gd9E2k9vx?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
